# remscontent_resource (Data Source)

Resource data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remscontent_resource" "example" {
  ResourceExtID = "urn:abc:10.example-not-real/abcde	"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_ext_id` (String) The external resource identifier or URN to look up. This should match the external ID assigned to the resource in REMS.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The resource ID
